ab: margi mumu. sékorudru ma mitai nga.
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: margi mumu. singsi ka nuburuburu ma mwa ku akanata pang Teldrekane spasobékénidria.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的茂林語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say food in Teldreka.

ab: urgu musu bicilringi ku spasobkéni ki singsi?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: singsi, ilrigu kwa, duruma kula kuvale musobakala?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: cngla kené! ngélava kwa isisipi kuvale.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.
Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pencils.
B:I forgot to bring my pencil.
A: Please take out the eraser.
B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.
B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: tathémanga kené asulutata. skakulanenga géciobi tapcacngle.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
